titleStmt.title: Uppsala, Uppsala University Library, O Etiop. 21
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Life of John Chrysostom
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Introduction by
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: 34 Homilies, each divided into a and a with distinct titles
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 1
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 1
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 1

Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Subscriptio

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in pencil in the upper outer corner. The folios have been left unfoliated.

collation.signatures: Decorated quire numbers to the left of the beginning of the text on the first folio of each quire except the first one.

handNote.desc: Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis1818130 calls it a "middle-size even hand" (Mittelgroße gleichmäßige Hand).

item.desc: Paper sticker on the inside of the front board.
item.q:
Uppsala Universitets
Bibliotek
Handskr. avd.
O Etiop. 21

item.desc: Note in pencil on the paper sticker listed as .

binding.decoNote: Wooden boards with blind-tooled leather quarter cover. The leather quarter cover has been fastened with strings in the inside of the boards.

history.origin: 18th century According to the colophon on , the original owner was Walda Kiros and the scribe was Gadla Giyorgis. The following family members of Walda Kiros are mentioned: his father Ḥǝzqǝyās, his mother ʾƎbrāwit, and his brother ʾAwkātewos. The name of one further brother or sister has been erased.
history.provenance: At an unknown point in time, Axel B. Svensson aquired the manuscript. He subsequently donated the manuscript to Archbishop Erling Eidem on 15 September 1948, according to a type-written note that—at least when the manuscript was catalogued by Oscar Anders Valfrid Löfgren—was kept together with the manuscript.
history.acquisition: In 1964, Erling Eidem donated the manuscript to its current repository (see Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis181849).

bibl.title: Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in Schweden
Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis
Alvin: Plattform för digitala samlingar och digitaliserat kulturarv
Beta maṣāḥǝft: Manuscripts of Ethiopia and Eritrea

tagsDecl.rendition: Red ink is used partially in the rubrication of punctuation.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
